message: components/ folder found inside app/ directory
suggestion: Move components/ to the project root level (alongside app/) per Next.js App Router conventions.

message: No lib/ or utils/ folder found
suggestion: Create a lib/ folder for shared utilities, helpers, and non-component logic to keep the codebase organised.

message: API routes found inside pages/api/ alongside App Router
suggestion: Migrate API routes to app/api/ using Route Handlers (route.ts files) — mixing pages/api/ with the App Router is unsupported.

message: Server Actions or server-only utilities found outside app/ or lib/
suggestion: Keep server-only files inside app/ (for server components/actions) or lib/ (for shared server utilities).
